description: This bright urban customizable template is the perfect was to generate enthusiasm with current and future customers. It features space to share photos, logos, call to action buttons, and a blog.  All BEE templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.

designer.description: Hi, I'm Betina, a digital designer currently working across emails, digital campaigns and social media.
